description_long: This object is a compact, rotary-barrel machine gun with a robust, industrial design. The main body is constructed from dark gray metal, featuring a prominent cylindrical drum and a thick, short barrel. The stock and foregrip are angular and finished in a brown camouflage pattern, providing both ergonomic support and visual distinction. A raised sighting mechanism is mounted above the barrel, and the trigger assembly is integrated into the rear grip. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, with visible screws and mechanical joints. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing practicality for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, rotary-barrel machine gun with a dark gray metal body and brown camouflage stock, featuring a prominent drum and raised sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, central drum, and the alignment of the sight above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical drum, thick barrel, brown camouflage stock, and the raised sight mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, the trigger area, and the symmetry of the drum and barrel assembly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the grip and mechanical joints.
attribute_barrel_type: short, standard cylindrical barrel with no visible cooling features or attachments
attribute_stock_design: fixed angular stock with brown camouflage finish, likely polymer or wood
attribute_magazine_type: rotary drum magazine integrated into the main body
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: raised front post with rear notch sight
